codeReview.summary: The implementation successfully converts the navigation editor into a drag-and-drop hierarchical tree using dnd-kit. It correctly adds endpoints for moving, updating, and creating navigation nodes as required, and populates the document selector. Vitest tests cover the hierarchy rendering and mutation endpoints, meeting all expectations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker deviated from the strict TDD procedure defined in the skill because the UI/API shape changes were broad across contracts, data-access, and mocks. They suggested allowing an initial alignment pass before strict UI TDD for features that heavily change data shapes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: skillFeedback.deviations in the handoff JSON explicitly states this deviation and suggests the update.

summary: Review passed. The navigation tree editor is fully implemented with drag-and-drop, edit/create dialogs, and comprehensive test coverage. Minor deviation from TDD due to refactoring scope was noted.
